items: Welcome by the School Board President, Cecilia Márquez
Additions, Deletions, or Modifications to the Agenda

If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on the links available under Public Content prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Review of the Human Resources Department's Vision and Plans for 2023-2024
Approval of the September 13 Board Meeting Minutes
Approval of Addendum to 2023-24 Measure U Application for Garfield Community School
Approval of School Assignments and Committee Assignments for Board Members for the 2023-24 School Year
Approval of the Agreement between the Redwood City School District and the Santa Clara County Office of Education
Approval of the Agreement between the Redwood City School District and San Mateo County Counsel
Approval of Amendment No. 1 between the Redwood City School District and Maxim Healthcare Services for the 2023-24 School Year
Approval of Local Interagency Agreement(s) to Provide Education and Training to Counselor Trainee Candidates
Approval of Additional Personnel Needed for 2023-24
Adoption of Resolution 4, Resolution to Adopt the Gann Limit
Approval of 2022-23 Unaudited Actuals Financial Statement
Approval of Application for Exemption from the Required Expenditures for Classroom Teachers' Salaries
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Other Business/Suggested Items For Future Agenda
Possible Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Meetings Calendar

llmResponse.agenda_changes: At the start of the meeting, a request was made to move items 8.2, 8.3, and 8.5 to consent. Item 8.2 is the Variable Term Waiver, 8.3 is the Provisional Internship Permit, and 8.5 is the Approval of Application for Exemption from the Required Expenditures for Classroom Teachers' Salaries. The board approved this change.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: I'll move to approve. I'll second it. You. All those in favor? Favor. I thank you.
